ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., SO2, SO4, NO3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant (e.g., ppm, ppb, mg/m3) */,
  "safe_limit" REAL /* Safe limit for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the data was collected */,
  "date_on" TEXT /* Date and time the data collection started */,
  "date_off" TEXT /* Date and time the data collection ended */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used to collect the data (e.g., sensor, sampler) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the data point belongs to */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant the data point is for */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the pollutant */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the measurement */,
  "detection_limit" REAL /* Detection limit of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_pollutants" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* ID of the site */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "monitoring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of monitoring (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_versions_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the alert belongs to */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant the alert is for */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_access" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team accessing the data */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "data_collection_id")
)
